series_description: Pleadings/Notices/transcripts/hearing records/exhibits/orders/decisions associated with individual appeals filed with the board. After a final determination has been made, these materials are retained in the board''s offices for 12 months and then destroyed.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office for 12 months from date of final order of BTA or in the event the order is appealed to the court pursuant to O.R.C. 5717.04, 60 days after final determination by the court.

series_title: Journal of the Board of Tax Appeals
series_description: This is a bound journalized record of the preceedings of the Board of Tax Appeals containing the Board's entries maintained pursuant to Ohio Revised Code Section 5703.02 (C), which entries briefly summarize the matter before the Board, the testimony or evidence presented, if any, the final determination or order of the Board regarding the appeal or application filed, and the vote of each of its Members upon every action taken by it. The journals, including those from the 1940's are referred to daily.
retention_statement: Paper: Permanent in Department becoming a part of the legal library, Board of Tax Appeals

series_description: These are authorizations to the Auditor of State to issue a warrant in payment of the Board of Tax Appeals obligations (including travel) upon certification by the Director of Finance that sufficient uncommitted appropriations are available for the purpose.
retention_statement: Paper: Current year plus 3 years past retained in Department. 4 years past and older sent to State Records Center for retention for 4 years

series_description: These include the payroll disbursement journal which is a computer print-out submitted each pay period to the Auditor of State authorizing payment to all personnel currently on the payroll upon certification by Personnel Dept. and the Director of Finance. These records also include sick leave forms and voluntary deduction forms submitted by employees.
retention_statement: Paper: Current year and 3 years past retained in department. Four years past and older sent to the State Records Center for retention for 4 years

series_description: This is a computer print-out printed daily (1) showing beginning balances of each account for each agency (2) All the transactions processed through the computer for that day for each agency and (3) ending balances for each account that was affected by the transactions.
retention_statement: Paper: Current year and 3 years past retained in the department. Four years past and older sent to State Records Center for retention for 4 years.

series_description: This is a computer printout which accompanies warrants issued by the Auditor of State reflecting the name of payee, amount of warrant, date issued and warrant number. This information is entered on to the respective voucher before sending the warrant for payment.
retention_statement: Paper: Current year plus 3 years past retained in the department. Four years past and older sent to the State Records Center for retenton for 4 years.

series_description: These include copies of purchase orders, state supply requisitions, state printing orders, interdepartmental purchase orders, miscellaneous and contract encumbrances.
retention_statement: Paper: Current year plus 3 years past retained in the department. Four years past and older sent to the State Records Center for retenton for 4 years.

series_description: These are personnel files belonging to employees of the Board of Tax Appeals.
retention_statement: Paper: Department records will be destroyed 2 years after the employee's termination date

series_title: Job Application and Resumes (Solicited and Unsolicited)
series_description: Job Application and Resumes (Solicited and Unsolicited)
retention_statement: Paper: Job applications and resumes will be destroyed every six months

series_description: Includes all informal miscellaneous messages, routine/generic e-mails, telephone messages and voicemails, post-it notes, calendars/schedules, notes, routine correspondeonce, drafts, or materials which serve to convey information of temporary importance and limited utility.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value.

series_description: Record Series Title: Agency Web Pages - Record Series. Description: These websites contain information made available to the public via the Internet as a matter of convenience. Records in this series may include, but are not limited to, general descriptive information about the board, frequently asked questions, rules of practice and procedure, bulletins and sample forms, weekly announcements, interim orders and decisions, annual reports, and meeting schedules. Hard copies of this information are maintained by the BTA board under separate retention schedules. Media Type: Machine readable/electronic. Retention Period: Retain online until content information is obsolete, replaced, or superseded. After the content information is obsolete, replaced, and/or superseded, a snapshot of the web page will then be captured and maintained offline for three months. Retention justification: These websites contain information made available to the public via the Internet as a matter of convenience. There exists administrative and legal value in capturing a periodic snapshot of the webpage in order to document what information was made available to the public when it was presented online. Method of disposal: Delete or erase.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until obsolete, replaced, and/or superseded for three months.

series_title: Miscellaneous Data Processing and Computer Usage Files
series_description: Electronic files or automated logs created to monitor computer system usage including but not limited to log-in files, system usage files, data entry logs, and records of individual computer program usage, summary reports and other records creating to document computer usage, copies of records or forms designed or used solely for data input and control when original records are retained elsewhere, documentation of requests for technical assistance, training information, network usage reports
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative or fiscal value to agency

series_description: Copies of master files or databases, application software, logs, directories, and other records needed to restore a system in case of a disaster or inadvertent destruction
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for a minimum of 12 backup cycles

series_title: Executive Budget Proposal, as well as preparatory information
series_description: Includes worksheets for proposed budgets, legislative testimony and related documents
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until end of biennium ; Electronic: Retain until end of biennium

series_description: Published periodic report on agency activities
retention_statement: Paper: Upon publication, fulfill the requirements of O.R.C. 149.11. Destroy excess copies when no longer of administrative value

series_description: Including Employee Handbook, publications explaining processes and procedures and miscellaneous correspondence and materials regarding employee conduct and workplace instructions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded or replaced

series_description: Correspondence of the Executive Director of the Board of Tax Appeals dealing with significant aspects of the board, including agency policies, procedures, program, fiscal and personnel matters.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after any director''s term

series_title: Board of Tax Appeals Administrative Rules
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after superseded, obsolete, or replaced. ; Electronic: Retain 2 years after superseded, obsolete, or replaced.

series_description: Records of policies including those covering access & security, systems development, data retention & disposition & data ownership. Records of procedures for data entry, the operation of computer equipment, system backup, and other aspects of a data processing operation, Records of data recovery plans
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced ; Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced
